title: Has anyone here tried using third-party app stores alongside Monday.com integrations?
excerpt:
I’ve been looking into different third-party app stores that offer apps not available in the official marketplaces, and I’m curious how others here feel about using them in combination with Monday.com. 
Do you think rely…

posts.author: evelyngrace1 (Evelyn Grace)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been looking into different third-party app stores that offer apps not available in the official marketplaces, and I’m curious how others here feel about using them in combination with Monday.com.

Do you think relying on a third-party app store is a good way to expand functionality and fill gaps that the official integrations don’t cover? Or does it introduce more risks than benefits in terms of security, updates, or long-term support?

I’d really like to hear from anyone who has tried it—what was your experience like, and would you recommend it to others here?
